content:
I don't feel like Daffodil is a problem anymore. 

Units like Mouchette can do turn 1 what it takes Daffodil some time to ramp up.

But I definitely agree with you that Wanda has been a casualty of the war on counter. 

I actually think Wanda is now held back by Castor as buffing Wanda to do what you are asking might make a Wanda Castor team very, very powerful.

Yeah, that sounds good. Honestly, anything that improves her performance in battle would be nice. Even something that makes her a more reliable partner for other units would be great, as long as it doesn’t push her back into being super niche like she is right now. <:Doll_Wait:1468259092459032606>
I think there's no reason why it shouldn't be allowed to be strong.

Those are good ideas, but I honestly doubt the devs care. Wanda will probably just get replaced by a new counter character with better mechanics, and she’ll be left behind. Even if she gets buffs, they’ll likely be minor balance changes. I doubt they’ll actually bring her out of the pit she’s in.

If she’s in such a bad spot, it’s probably because they want to keep her that way that’s honestly what I think. There are also several characters who don’t even have a personal passive besides the Arc 2 one, and they’ve just been left like that.

I agree with this. It really feels like balance feedback or rework suggestions don’t get much attention from the devs unless it’s about bug fixes or visual issues. It’s just easier for them to leave a character as they are and release a new one that does the same thing, but better. A good example is Vortice. She basically fills the same role as Doresain, but does it better. She can buff her own crit rate and crit damage, has AoE Dmg, and can even wave damage without using her ultimate. On top of that, she ignores fortress, and her scaling is much better since it’s based on tentacle damage instead of just Power.
